title: senecio doronicum subsp. ruthenensis
intro: Senecio doronicum subsp. ruthenensis, also known as Doronicum ruthenicum, is a subspecies of the Doronicum genus, a type of flowering plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating digestive issues, due to its bitter compounds which stimulate digestive enzymes and improve liver function. The health benefits of Senecio doronicum subsp. ruthenensis include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Senecio doronicum subsp. ruthenensis is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
